scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-bridge build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n renderer,bridge,electron-build,electron -c auto "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-bridge dev" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:../../packages/obs-bridge/dist/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
